# nros-rmw-abi — the PURE C header package that is the single source of
# truth for the RMW backend contract (RFC-0054, phase-299): rmw_vtable.h,
# rmw_entity.h, rmw_event.h, rmw_ret.h, rmw_transport.h under
# `include/nros/`. No library is built here; C/C++ backends include the
# headers, and the Rust side (`nros-rmw-cffi`) consumes COMMITTED bindgen
# output regenerated by `scripts/gen-abi-bindings.sh`.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(nros_rmw_abi VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES C)

add_library(nros_rmw_abi_headers INTERFACE)
target_include_directories(nros_rmw_abi_headers INTERFACE
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include")
add_library(NanoRos::RmwAbi ALIAS nros_rmw_abi_headers)

# Back-compat alias — pre-RFC-0054 consumers linked the headers via the
# nros-rmw-cffi package target of this name.
add_library(nros_rmw_cffi_headers ALIAS nros_rmw_abi_headers)
